url.description: URL to the bug bounty policy or program page

contact.description: Contact URL (mailto: or https://) or empty string

allows_disclosure.description: Whether the program allows public disclosure

pgp_key.description: URL to PGP key for encrypted communication

description.description: Short description of the program scope and rules

program_type.description: Type of program: paid bounty, vulnerability disclosure, or hybrid

status.description: Whether the program currently accepts reports

target.description: The in-scope target identifier (domain, app name, etc.)

type.description: Asset type (e.g. web, mobile, api, hardware, iot, network, cloud, desktop, other)

scope.description: Structured in-scope targets with asset type

testing_policy_url.description: URL to the full testing rules or policy document

excluded_methods.description: Forbidden testing techniques (e.g. social_engineering, dos, phishing)

requires_account.description: Whether testing requires creating an account on the target

payout_table.description: Per-severity maximum payout amounts (same currency as currency field)

response_sla_days.description: Committed initial acknowledgment time in business days

legal_terms_url.description: URL to the program's legal or participation terms

hall_of_fame_url.description: URL to the researcher acknowledgments or hall of fame page

swag_details.description: Description of swag offered (e.g. T-shirt for critical findings)

reporting_url.description: Specific report submission endpoint, if different from the program page

standards.description: Standards the program follows (e.g. ISO 29147, ISO 30111, disclose.io)
